skills.summary: How to answer current weather, temperature, and forecast queries through direct web search capabilities.
Control the NM-CYD-C5 on-board WS2812 RGB LED on GPIO27. Use the single canonical script `nm_cyd_c5_rgb` with mode/color/brightness args; never hand-write led_strip or gpio code.

Control the NM-CYD-C5 on-board ST7789 LCD. Use the single canonical script `nm_cyd_c5_screen` (mode=color/text/message/clear) with synchronous run_lua_script; never hand-write display code or use async.

Adjust the NM-CYD-C5 LCD backlight brightness (0..100%) via the LEDC PWM on GPIO25. Use the single canonical script `nm_cyd_c5_backlight` with `percent` or `mode=on/off`; never hand-write ledc/gpio code.

Discover and control NMMiner / NMAxe / NMAxeGamma / NMQAxe++ Bitcoin solo miners on the LAN via on-device Lua scripts (nmminer_scan / nmminer_info / nmminer_control / nmminer_setting). nmminer_scan auto-derives the /24 from the device's own STA IP and sweeps it; pass seed_ips=[...] only as an optional speedup. The scripts perform all HTTP work locally; the LLM only chooses a script and forwards the printed summary.
